title: 20 Signs He DEFINITELY Likes You!!! | Ask Kimberly
text: Are you in a situation; a love situation, a relationship situation, a crush situation, well, honestly I have your back. We are dishing the dirt today, guys, I'm giving you my top 20 weirdest kind of most unexpected signs that your crush is into you. As a relationship expert I feel like I could just give you the things that I like so obvious, that everybody will tell you, but I'm not going to do that. I'm going to give you the 20 weirdest things that are going to make you say, "Oh, I never even noticed that." If you're new to AskKimberly, don't forget to hit the big subscribe button down below and come and follow me over on social media, so that you do not miss the next surprise - Q&A, I do them every other week on social media and then answer your questions live in a YouTube video every other week. All right, you guys, are you ready to find out if your crush likes you. Let's get right into this video.

title: 20 Signs He DEFINITELY Likes You!!! | Ask Kimberly
text: ext surprise - Q&A, I do them every other week on social media and then answer your questions live in a YouTube video every other week. All right, you guys, are you ready to find out if your crush likes you. Let's get right into this video. Number one is that they don't yawn in your presence. Yawning usually indicates like boredom or severe lack of interest. You might be thinking, "But, Kimberly, what if my crush is like really, really tired, won't they be yawning then?" Guys even when we're really, really tired, the adrenaline of talking to someone that we like a lot is actually enough to jolt our system into being super alert, which makes yawning and relaxation highly unlikely. Number two, when he's talking about other girls in your presence or when she's talking about other guys in your presence, they always preface it by saying "my friend so and so" instead of just using that person's name. This is because your crush wants to make sure that you know that this person is not a romantic interest and someone that you do not need to be threatened by. If your crush does this is, it's a really high probability that they're crushing on you too. Number three, there's an awkward silence. Now, guys, a lot of us see awkward silence as being a bad thing but in crush-land an awkward silence can be very, very good, because it's happening because that person is nervous. If your crush didn't like you at all there's no way that they'd be nervous around you. Sign number four is that they never look at their phone. Most of us have a habit of checking our phones every once in awhile, it's only naturally - we want to see what's going on social media, checking our messages, yeah. But if your crush likes you they will almost never look at their phone in your presence, they want to absorb every single minute of time with you, they are not going to waste it looking at their phone. So if your crush never has their nose buried in their phone, it's because they're probably trying to get quality face time with you. Number five, guys, is that they pay for something in full or in a reverse gender or sexuality situation, they allow you to pay for something in full. People who are interested in a romantic relationship like to maintain the rules of chivalry, It's just a really clear demonstration of the intent behind whatever it is that you're doing. So if I really like someone I'm going to show them my intent by allowing them to pay for something, but if I don't like someone, there's no way in heck, I'm going to allow them to pay for my ice cream, my lunch, you name it - anything, because I don't want them to get the wrong idea. Number six is that they listen to a band, that you've mentioned that they've never heard of before. And I've said you guys, for this one, they want to impress you but they also creepily want to get inside your head and want to get to know you a little bit better. It kind of creepy, but so, so true. Number seven is that borrowed something and they don't even ask for it back, fact, they encourage you to hang on to that item for as long as you need. If they encourage you to hang on to that little thing you borrowed, it's usually because they want themselves at the forefront of your mind, they want you to think of them every time you put on that sweater, or read that book, or listen to that music. They don't want to close the door by asking for that thing back. Number eight is that your crush might start to seem a little creepy, and I mean, this in the best possible way, so they might start turning up where you are, like in your post on social media, like anything to kind of get a conversation going and to have something to talk about, also, guys, it can be hard to keep it cool when you have a crush on someone, so you can't blame them for this one. Number nine is that they've invited you to at least one group event. Now just because someone hasn't asked you out on a one-on-one date it doesn't mean that they don't like you guys. Asking someone on a one-on-one date is really hard and super intimidating, so if they're shy there's a good chance that they're going to go for the group approach first. So if your crush has included you on any of their group invites, like to a movie, or to a party, or something like that, there's a good chance they might be feeling the love. Number 10 is that they come up with a nickname for you. I don't care what the nickname is. I don't care if it's small- fry, or boobber face, or the love of my life. People don't tease or even think about people that they don't care about and that they don't like, so any nickname in the history of man is a good sign. Number 11 is that they talk about themselves. You know how a peacock flaunts its feathers? When your crush likes you they're going to feel the need to prove themselves to you. They're going to want to tell you things that make themselves seem awesome, like how they got 99% on a test, or how they scored a goal of the game, like it really doesn't matter - they're trying to make themselves seem really awesome, there's a good chance they like you too. Number 12, grooming and personal-care. Pay close attention to if your crush is showing things that demonstrate a bit of effort in your presence. Things like wearing fresh lipstick or lip gloss, wearing cologne, or dressing really, really nice for an event that isn't even that fancy. This is a huge indicator that the reason they did this is for you. Number 13 is that they comfort you. If something bad happens to you, obviously, your crush is not going to be happy about it, they're going to feel sorry for you too, but they're going to be the first one to be like, "Oh, are you okay? You need a hug? Come here. It's okay." Trust me guys your crush will take that opportunity to comfort you and make you feel better if they're crushing on you too. Number 14 is the emoticons, guys. I feel like emoticons are like designed for good flirting. If your crush uses a lot of emoticons during texting, especially this, this, or this, then there's a good chance they're trying to evoke emotion and make you smile. Number 15 is that they stutter, stutter, stutter. If your crush stutters when they're talking to you, it's probably because they're nervous about messing up, they're nervous about what they're going to say, and they want to get it totally right for you. Number 16 is kind a weird, it's when your crush puts down another guy or girl that kind of represents the competition in front of you. So if I'm talking to my crush and trying to be all cool and then another little blond YouTuber named Kimberly walks by, and I'm like, "Oh my god, she's a threat," I might instinctively put that other person down in order to demonstrate my own value to my crush. Obviously, guys, I'm married, and it's not nice to put other people down but this is something that your crush might do if they feel threatened by someone else in their presence. Number 17 is that your crush flirts with you more than with other people. Now flirting in general is a sign of attraction but sometimes people could just be really, really flirty, so it's hard to know if you stand out among all of the other people that they flirt with. So pay close attention to the level of flirting that they're doing with you verses what they're doing with other people. Number 18 is that they use your actual name often, so instead of saying like, "Hey you," or "Hey" or just like not saying any name at all. If your name is Melissa, they're going to say, "Hey Melissa, can you grab me that pencil over there?" Or, "Hey Melissa, what was Mr. Anderson's homework for last night?" They're always going to want to use your name whenever possible, and this is actually subliminal for them too, so they're not even going to realize that's what we're doing. Number19 is that they observed other signs of chivalry too, like pulling out a chair for you, or opening the door, and this is because chivalry isn't dead - we want to do nice things for the people that we like, and sometimes we do it without even realizing. Finally, guys, number 20. We have made it to the end of our list. Number 20 is that they go out of their way for you. Here it, it could be for anything, whether it's getting a bathroom pass, even if they don't have to go to the bathroom because you know they want to talk to you to, sitting beside you on a bus, or coming to watch you at a performance or a sporting event. If they do something they wouldn't normally do just for the sake of seeing you or talking to you, it's a good sign - your crush is crushing on you. All right, you guys, if you loved this video, give it a huge thumbs up, and don't forget to come and follow me over on social media so you don't miss the next live Q and A that happens on YouTube every other week. And, of course, guys, subscribe to Ask Kimberly here on YouTube for more weekly videos on relationships. Bye. Captions by GetTranscribed.com
